raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white onion is on a wooden cutting board. A chef's knife is on the same board. The onion is a solid, irregular object; the knife has a sharp blade and a handle. STRATEGY - First, grasp the onion to pick it up. Then, place it on the cutting board. Next, grasp the knife to pick it up. Finally, perform a chopping motion on the onion. Failure modes include dropping the onion or knife, or misaligning the knife during chopping. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the onion body; Step 2 grasp the onion body; Step 3 place the onion on the board; Step 4 grasp the knife handle; Step 5 perform a chopping motion on the onion.
Goal: chopped(onion)
Scene: onion, knife, cutting_board
Step 1: reach(onion)
  affordance_region: the body of the white onion
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, onion, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, onion) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(onion)
  affordance_region: the body of the white onion
  contact: holding(onion) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(onion)
Step 3: place(onion -> cutting_board)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the cutting board
  contact: surface_contact(onion, cutting_board) [completion]; released(onion) [completion]
  pose: stable(onion) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(onion, cutting_board) AND released(onion)
Step 4: grasp(knife)
  affordance_region: the handle of the chef's knife
  contact: holding(knife) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(knife)
Step 5: chop(knife, onion)
  affordance_region: the blade of the chef's knife
  contact: knife_contact(onion) [completion]; released(knife) [completion]
  pose: stable(knife) [completion]
  done_when: knife_contact(onion) AND released(knife)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the white onion
the body of the white onion
an empty area on the cutting board
the handle of the chef's knife
the blade of the chef's knife
